opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: The back of my right testicle is completely swollen, red hot, and hurts terribly when I walk or pee. It's been building up over about three days and now I can barely move around.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The pain and swelling have got worse over three days and now it hurts to walk and to pass urine — I'm worried something is really wrong down there.

symptom_narrative.onset: gradual, came on over about three days rather than all at once
symptom_narrative.character: a deep aching, hot, swollen soreness at the back of the right testicle, very tender to touch
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: really bad — it hurts a lot when I walk or pee, and the weight of it dragging is awful
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the back of my right testicle and the scrotum on that side
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant, worse on moving and walking
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: it eases a bit if I wear tight supportive underwear and hold it up
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: walking, standing and passing urine make it worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: it stings and burns when I pee, I keep needing to go and go urgently, and I noticed some discharge stain on my underwear this morning. I've felt a bit off and warm too.
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm walking with my legs apart and slowly because it hurts so much; I've barely been able to get around

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: took some over the last day or two

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: sexually active; anxious about the swelling and worried it could cause permanent damage

objective_data_offered.value: 37.8 C on my thermometer at home, felt a bit hot and off
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home thermometer

objective_data_offered.value: the right side of my scrotum looks red and is swollen and hot compared to the other side
there was a yellowish discharge stain on my underwear this morning
it burns when I pee and I keep needing to go urgently and often
about 80 kg on my home scales
